jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Shadowfax
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
